Glossary.AllAroundVision: 这个怪物可以同时看见所有方向，因此无法被夹击。
Glossary.AquaticAmbush:
Requirements The monster is hiding in water and a creature that hasn't detected it is within the listed number of feet.

Effect The monster moves up to its swim Speed + 10 feet toward the triggering creature, traveling on water and on land. Once the creature is in reach, the monster makes a Strike against it. The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} against this Strike.
Glossary.AttackOfOpportunity:
触发 位于怪物触及范围内的一个生物使用操作动作、移动动作、远程攻击，或是在一次移动动作中离开了该方格。

效果 怪物尝试对触发的生物发动一次近战打击。如果这次攻击是一次重击，并且是由操作动作触发，则怪物打断了该动作。这次打击不会计算多重攻击减值，并且多重攻击减值也不适用于这次打击。
Glossary.AtWillSpells: 怪物可以施放任意多次随意法术而无需花费法术位。
Glossary.Aura:
怪物的灵光会自动影响怪物周边指定发散范围内的一切事物。怪物无需在灵光上花费任何动作；灵光将在特定的时间起效，例如生物在灵光内结束其回合或是生物进入灵光。

如果一个灵光仅造成伤害，它的条目中只会列出半径、伤害和豁免检定。这类灵光在生物进入灵光或是在灵光内开始其回合时对生物造成伤害。一个生物在同一回合内仅会被此灵光伤害一次。

GM也许会判定怪物的光环不会影响其盟友。例如，一个生物在与某怪物长时间同处之后可能会免疫此怪物的气势凶猛。
Glossary.Buck:
Most monsters that serve as mounts can attempt to buck off unwanted or annoying riders, but most mounts will not use this reaction against a trusted creature unless the mounts are spooked or mistreated.

Trigger A creature @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.PM5jvValFkbFH3TV]{Mounts} or uses the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.q9nbyIF0PEBqMtYe]{Command an Animal} action while riding the monster.

Effect The triggering creature must succeed at a Reflex saving throw against the listed DC or fall off the creature and land @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}. If the save is a critical failure, the triggering creature also takes @Damage[1d6[bludgeoning]] damage in addition to the normal damage for the fall.
Glossary.CatchRock:
Requirements The monster must have a free hand but can @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.wQYmDStjdjn0I26t]{Release} anything it's holding as part of this reaction.

Trigger The monster is targeted with a thrown rock Strike or a rock would fall on the monster.

Effect The monster gains a +4 circumstance bonus to its AC against the triggering attack or to any defense against the falling rock. If the attack misses or the monster successfully defends against the falling rock, the monster catches the rock, takes no damage, and is now holding the rock.
Glossary.ChangeFormation:
The troop reconfigures to assume one of the formations below they know. Using this action again ends any previous formation, and the troop can also use this action to revert to its default formation, ending any benefits and drawbacks.

  • Loose Members of the troop fan out to cover more ground. Benefit Any weaknesses the troop has to area and splash damage are suppressed. Drawback Enemies' saving throws against the troop's damaging effects are one degree of success better than they roll.
  • Marching Column This formation traverses long distances more rapidly. Benefit The troop gains a +10 foot circumstance bonus to all its Speeds. Drawback The troop is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} and takes a –2 penalty to Reflex saves.
  • Turtle Shell The troop interlocks their shields. Only a group with shields can use this formation. Benefit The troop gains a +2 circumstance bonus to AC against ranged attacks and to Reflex saves. Drawback The troop takes a –10-foot penalty to all its Speeds.
  • Wedge The troop aligns itself behind a powerful commander. Benefit The troop chooses an adjacent allied creature without the troop trait to fall in behind. Each time the chosen creature Strides, the troop follows as a free action, Striding to keep the chosen creature adjacent. Drawback The troop loses some of their autonomy. They're slowed 1 and can't voluntarily move away from their leader.
Glossary.ChangeShape: The monster changes its shape indefinitely. It can use this action again to return to its natural shape or adopt a new shape. Unless otherwise noted, a monster cannot use Change Shape to appear as a specific individual. Using Change Shape counts as creating a disguise for the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{Impersonate} use of Deception. The monster's transformation automatically defeats Perception DCs to determine whether the creature is a member of the ancestry or creature type into which it transformed, and it gains a +4 status bonus to its Deception DC to prevent others from seeing through its disguise. Change Shape abilities specify what shapes the monster can adopt. The monster doesn't gain any special abilities of the new shape, only its physical form. For example, in each shape, it replaces its normal Speeds and Strikes, and might potentially change its senses or size. Any changes are listed in its stat block.
Glossary.ConstantSpells: 一个恒定法术将持续对怪物生效而无需怪物施放之，并且法术的持续时间为永久。如果一个恒定法术被反制，则怪物可以花费此法术正常情况下所要求的施法动作来将其重新激活。
Glossary.Constrict: The monster deals the listed amount of damage to any number of creatures @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained} by it. Each of those creatures can attempt a basic Fortitude save with the listed DC.
Glossary.Coven:
This monster can form a coven with two or more other creatures who also have the coven ability. This involves performing an 8-hour ceremony with all prospective coven members. After the coven is formed, each of its members gains elite adjustments, adjusting their levels accordingly. Coven members can sense other members' locations and conditions by spending a single action, which has the concentrate trait, and can sense what another coven member is sensing as a two-action activity, which has the concentrate trait as well.

Covens also grant spells and rituals to their members, but these can be cast only in cooperation between three coven members who are all within 30 feet of one another. A coven member can contribute to a coven spell with a single action that has the concentrate trait. If two coven members have contributed these actions within the last round, a third member can cast a coven spell on her turn by spending the normal spellcasting actions. A coven can cast its coven spells an unlimited number of times but can cast only one coven spell each round. All covens grant the 8th-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.dN8QBNuTiaBHCKUe]{Cursed Metamorphosis} spell and all the following spells, which the coven can cast at any rank up to 5th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.41TZEjhO6D1nWw2X]{Augury}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.vLA0q0WOK2YPuJs6]{Charm}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.HXhWYJviWalN5tQ2]{Clairaudience}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.zvKWclOZ7A53DObE]{Clairvoyance}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.yM3KTTSAIHhyuP14]{Dream Message}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.i35dpZFI7jZcRoBo]{Illusory Disguise}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Ucf8eynbZMfUucjE]{Illusory Scene}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Ek5XI0aEdZhBgm21]{Scouting Eye}, and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.FM3SmEW8N1FCRjqt]{Talking Corpse}. Individual creatures with the coven ability also grant additional spells to any coven they join. A coven can also cast the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.XkDCzMIyc0YOjw05]{Control Weather} ritual, with a DC of 23 instead of the standard DC.

If a coven member's departure or death brings the coven below three members, the remaining members keep their elite adjustments for 24 hours, but without enough members to contribute the necessary actions, they can't cast coven spells.
Glossary.Darkvision: A monster with darkvision can see perfectly well in areas of darkness and dim light, though such vision is in black and white only. Some forms of magical darkness, such as a 4th-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.4GE2ZdODgIQtg51c]{Darkness} spell, block normal darkvision. A monster with @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.bestiary-ability-glossary.Item.4Ho2xMPEC05aSxzr]{Greater Darkvision}, however, can see through even these forms of magical darkness.
Glossary.Disease: 当一名生物暴露在怪物的疾病下时，它需要尝试一次强韧豁免用以避免感染该疾病。疾病的等级为造成疾病的怪物的等级。疾病遵从于苦难规则。
Glossary.Engulf:
The monster Strides up to double its Speed and can move through the spaces of any creatures in its path. Any creature of the monster's size or smaller whose space the monster moves through can attempt a Reflex save with the listed DC to avoid being engulfed. A creature unable to act automatically critically fails this save. If a creature succeeds at its save, it can choose to be either pushed aside (out of the monster's path) or pushed in front of the monster to the end of the monster's movement. The monster can attempt to Engulf the same creature only once in a single use of Engulf. The monster can contain as many creatures as can fit in its space.

A creature that fails its save is pulled into the monster's body. It is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}, is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1}, and has to hold its breath or start suffocating. The creature takes the listed amount of damage when first engulfed and at the end of each of its turns while it's engulfed. An engulfed creature can get free by @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escaping} against the listed escape DC. An engulfed creature can attack the monster engulfing it, but only with unarmed attacks or with weapons of light Bulk or less. The engulfing creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} against the attack. If the monster takes piercing or slashing damage equaling or exceeding the listed Rupture value from a single attack or spell, the engulfed creature cuts itself free.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.1cbIe569UD6paXad]{Effect: Engulf and Swallow Whole}

A creature that gets free by either method can immediately breathe and exits the swallowing monster's space.

If the monster dies, all creatures it has engulfed are automatically released as the monster's form loses cohesion.
Glossary.FastHealing: 拥有此能力的怪物在其回合开始时将恢复一定数量的生命值。
Glossary.Ferocity:
Trigger The monster is reduced to 0 HP.

Effect The monster avoids being knocked out and remains at 1 HP, but its @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Yl48xTdMh3aeQYL2]{Wounded} value increases by 1. When it is Wounded 3, it can no longer use this ability
Glossary.FormUp: 部队选择它当前占据的一格空间，重新分配其所占据的方格，新的方格可以是任何形状，但是所有方格必须连续，并且位于被选择的方格的15尺之内。部队不能和其他生物共享空间。
Glossary.FrightfulPresence:
A creature that first enters the area must attempt a Will save.

Regardless of the result of the saving throw, the creature is temporarily immune to this monster's Frightful Presence for 1 minute.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected by the presence.

Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}.

Critical Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 4}.
Glossary.GolemAntimagic:
A golem is immune to spells and magical abilities other than its own, but each type of golem is affected by a few types of magic in special ways. These exceptions are listed in shortened form in the golem's stat block, with the full rules appearing here. If an entry lists multiple types (such as "cold and water"), either type of spell can affect the golem.

  • Harmed By Any magic of this type that targets the golem causes it to take the listed amount of damage (this damage has no type) instead of the usual effect. If the golem starts its turn in an area of magic of this type or is affected by a persistent effect of the appropriate type, it takes the damage listed in the parenthetical.
  • Healed By Any magic of this type that targets the golem makes the golem lose the slowed condition and gain HP equal to half the damage the spell would have dealt. If the golem starts its turn in an area of this type of magic, it gains the HP listed in the parenthetical.
  • Slowed By Any magic of this type that targets the golem causes it to be @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for [[/gmr 2d6 #rounds]]{2d6 rounds} instead of the usual effect. If the golem starts its turn in an area of this type of magic, it's slowed 1 for that round.
  • Vulnerable To Each golem is vulnerable to one or more specific spells, with the effects described in its stat block.
Glossary.Grab:
Requirements The monster's last action was a successful Strike that lists Grab in its damage entry, or the monster has a creature @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}

Effect If used after a Strike, the monster attempts to [[/act grapple]] the creature using the body part it attacked with. This attempt neither applies nor counts toward the creature's multiple attack penalty.

The monster can instead use Grab and choose one creature it's grabbing or restraining with an appendage that has Grab to automatically extend that condition to the end of the monster's next turn.
Glossary.GreaterConstrict: The monster deals the listed amount of damage to any number of creatures @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained} by it. Each of those creatures can attempt a basic Fortitude save with the listed DC. A creature that fails this save falls @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious}, and a creature that succeeds is then temporarily immune to falling unconscious from Greater Constrict for 1 minute.
Glossary.GreaterDarkvision: 拥有高等黑暗视觉的生物可以在黑暗和昏暗光照下正常视物，可惜这种视觉只能看见黑白两色。拥有高等黑暗视觉的生物甚至可以看穿魔法黑暗。
Glossary.Hover: When a monster's land speed indicates that the creature hovers, its land Speed represents how fast it can move while hovering within 5 feet of a solid surface. Hovering creatures don't count as flying but might be able to avoid certain types of difficult or hazardous terrain, at the GM's discretion.
Glossary.ImprovedGrab:
Trigger The monster's last action was a successful Strike that lists Improved Grab in its damage entry, or the monster has a creature @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}

Effect If used after a Strike, the monster attempts to [[/act grapple]] the creature using the body part it attacked with as a free action. This attempt neither applies nor counts toward the creature's multiple attack penalty.

The monster can instead use Improved Grab as an action and choose one creature it's grabbing or restraining with an appendage that has Improved Grab to automatically extend that condition to the end of the monster's next turn.
Glossary.ImprovedKnockdown:
Trigger The monster's last action was a successful Strike that lists Improved Knockdown in its damage entry

Effect The monster attempts to [[/act trip]] the creature as a free action. This attempt neither applies nor counts toward the monster's multiple attack penalty.
Glossary.ImprovedPush:
Trigger The monster's last action was a successful Strike that lists Improved Push in its damage entry

Effect The monster attempts to [[/act shove]] the creature. This attempt neither applies nor counts toward the monster's multiple attack penalty. If Improved Push lists a distance, change the distance the creature is pushed on a success to that distance.
Glossary.Knockdown:
Requirements The monster's last action was a successful Strike that lists Knockdown in its damage entry

Effect The monster attempts to [[/act trip]] the creature. This attempt neither applies nor counts toward the monster's multiple attack penalty.
Glossary.Lifesense: 生命感知使得怪物能够感知所列范围内所有活物与不死生物的生命力。就如同视觉可以分辨不同的颜色那般，这种感觉可以区分驱使活物的命能和驱使不死生物的虚能。
Glossary.LightBlindness: When first exposed to bright light, the monster is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} until the end of its next turn. After this exposure, light doesn't blind the monster again until after it spends 1 hour in darkness. However, as long as the monster is in an area of bright light, it's @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled}.
Glossary.LowLightVision: The monster can see in dim light as though it were bright light, so it ignores the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} condition due to dim light.
Glossary.NegativeHealing: 具有虚能治疗效果的生物从虚能而不是命能中获取生命。它被命能伤害所伤，而不是命能治疗所治愈。它不会受到虚能伤害，并且会被治疗不死的虚能效果治愈。
Glossary.NoBreath: The monster doesn't breathe and is immune to effects that require breathing.
Glossary.Poison: 当一名生物暴露在怪物的毒素下时，它需要尝试一次强韧豁免用以避免中毒。毒素的等级为造成疾病的怪物的等级。毒素遵从于苦难规则。
Glossary.PowerAttack:
频率一回合一次

效果 怪物进行一次近战攻击。当计算怪物的多次攻击惩罚时，这会算作两次攻击。如果这次攻击命中，怪物造成的武器伤害会额外增加一个武器的伤害骰。
Glossary.Pull:
Requirements The monster's last action was a success with a Strike that lists Pull in its damage entry

Effect The monster attempts to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.lOE4yjUnETTdaf2T]{Reposition} the creature, moving it closer to the monster. This attempt neither applies nor counts toward the monster's multiple attack penalty. If Pull lists a distance, change the distance the creature is pulled on a success to that distance.
Glossary.Push:
Requirements The monster's last action was a successful Strike that lists Push in its damage entry

Effect The monster attempts to [[/act shove]] the creature. This attempt neither applies nor counts toward the monster's multiple attack penalty. If Push lists a distance, change the distance the creature is pushed on a success to that distance.
Glossary.ReactiveStrike:
触发 位于怪物触及范围内的一个生物使用操作动作、移动动作、远程攻击，或是在一次移动动作中离开了该方格。

效果 怪物尝试对触发的生物发动一次近战打击。如果这次攻击是一次重击，并且是由操作动作触发，则怪物打断了该动作。这次打击不会计算多重攻击减值，并且多重攻击减值也不适用于这次打击。
Glossary.Regeneration: This monster regains the listed number of Hit Points each round at the beginning of its turn. Its @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{Dying} condition never increases beyond Dying 3 as long as its regeneration is active. However, if it takes damage of a type listed in the regeneration entry, its regeneration deactivates until the end of its next turn. Deactivate the regeneration before applying any damage of a listed type, since that damage might kill the monster by bringing it to Dying 4.
Glossary.Rend:
撕裂条目中会列出一项怪物所拥有的打击。

要求怪物在同一轮中连续两次使用在条目中列的打击类型命中同一名生物。

效果 怪物自动对此敌人造成打击伤害。
Glossary.RetributiveStrike:
触发 一个敌人对怪物的盟友造成了伤害，且两者都距离怪物15尺以内。

效果 盟友对被触发的伤害获得2+怪物等级的全伤害抗力。如果敌人在触及范围内，怪物对其发动一次近战打击。
Glossary.Scent:
灵敏嗅觉通过气味感应生物或物品，并且这是一种朦胧感官。其作用范围已在能力中列出，并且仅能在侦测散发出气味的生物或物品时起效（例如，无生命的生物通常都不会发出气味）。

如果一个生物散发出浓郁的气味或是出于上风处，GM可将灵敏嗅觉用于侦测此生物的范围加倍或加至三倍，而当生物出于下风处时GM则可减小作用范围。
Glossary.ShieldBlock:
触发 怪物已经举起了盾牌，并且受到一次物理攻击的伤害。

效果怪物挺起盾牌格挡了攻击。盾牌使得怪物所受的伤害减少最多等同于盾牌硬度的数值。怪物和盾牌同时承受剩余的伤害，并且这也可能损坏或摧毁盾牌。
Glossary.SneakAttack: When the monster Strikes a creature that has the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} condition with an agile or finesse melee weapon, an agile or finesse unarmed attack, or a ranged weapon attack, it also deals the listed precision damage. For a ranged attack with a thrown weapon, that weapon must also be an agile or finesse weapon.
Glossary.Stench: A creature entering the aura or starting its turn in the area must succeed at a Fortitude save or become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} (plus @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} as long as it's sickened on a critical failure). A creature that succeeds at its save or recovers from being sickened is temporarily immune to all stench auras for 1 minute.
Glossary.SwallowWhole:
The monster attempts to swallow a creature of the listed size or smaller that it has grabbed or restrained in its jaws or mouth. If a swallowed creature is of the maximum size listed, the monster can't use Swallow Whole again. If the creature is smaller than the maximum, the monster can usually swallow more creatures; the GM determines the maximum. The monster attempts an @Check[athletics|defense:reflex] check opposed by the grabbed creature's Reflex DC. If it succeeds, it swallows the creature. The monster's mouth or jaws no longer grab a creature it has swallowed, so the monster is free to use them to Strike or Grab once again. The monster can't attack creatures it has swallowed.

A swallowed creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}, is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1}, and has to hold its breath or start suffocating. The swallowed creature takes the listed amount of damage when first swallowed and at the end of each of its turns while it's swallowed. If the victim @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escapes} this ability's grabbed condition, it exits through the monster's mouth. This frees any other creature grabbed in the monster's mouth or jaws. A swallowed creature can attack the monster that has swallowed it, but only with unarmed attacks or with weapons of light Bulk or less. The swallowing creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} against the attack. If the monster takes piercing or slashing damage equaling or exceeding the listed Rupture value from a single attack or spell, the swallowed creature cuts itself free. A creature that gets free by either Escaping or cutting itself free can immediately breathe and exits the swallowing monster's space.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.1cbIe569UD6paXad]{Effect: Engulf and Swallow Whole}

If the monster dies, a swallowed creature can be freed by creatures adjacent to the corpse if they spend a combined total of 3 actions cutting the monster open with a weapon or unarmed attack that deals piercing or slashing damage.
Glossary.SwarmMind: 该怪物并没有一个单一的心智（通常是因为它是一个小型生物的集群），并且免疫以特定数量生物为目标的心灵效果。它仍然会受到那些对范围内所有生物起效的心灵效果。
Glossary.Telepathy: 具有心灵感应能力的怪物可以与所列半径内任意生物进行心灵交流，然而它们必须能够使用同种语言。这并没有给他们的思维提供特殊的渠道，也无法比正常的开口交流传递更多的信息。
Glossary.Thoughtsense: 思维感知允许怪物感知所列范围内的所有心智生物。
Glossary.ThrowRock: 怪物从触及范围内捡起一块石头、或是干脆取出一块被收好的石头，然后扔出去，进行一次远程打击。
Glossary.Trample: 怪物以其两倍的速度行走，并且可以在移动中穿越所列体型的生物所占据的空间，并且对这些被其进入占据空间的生物发动践踏。在每次使用践踏时，怪物只能对同一名生物尝试一次践踏。怪物造成所列的打击伤害，并且被践踏的生物可以尝试一次基础反射豁免对抗所列DC（大成功不受伤，成功伤害减半，大失败两倍伤害）。
Glossary.Tremorsense: 震颤感知允许怪物感受到那些因为移动而引起的固体表面的振动。这是一种在（能力所列出的）有限范围内的模糊感官。只有当怪物位于同一物体的表面、且仅在对象沿着表面移动（或是钻入）时，震颤感知才会生效。
Glossary.TroopDefenses:
Troops are composed of many individuals, represented by four "segments" on a battle grid. Each segment is 10 feet on each side and as tall as the individual members of the troop. Segments must remain contiguous. Each one has to share at least 5 feet of one of its edges with another segment—being adjacent on a diagonal isn't sufficient! You can measure flanking, cover, and the like using the center of any segment.

A troop has two Hit Point thresholds in its HP entry and loses segments as it crosses thresholds. Typically, the higher threshold is at 2/3 of the troop's maximum Hit Points and the lower is at 1/3 of its maximum. Once the troop drops below the higher threshold, it loses one segment, leaving three segments (12 squares) remaining and setting the first threshold as the troop's new maximum Hit Points. This repeats when the troop drops below the lower threshold, leaving two segments (8 squares). At 0 Hit Points, the troop disperses entirely, with the few remaining members surrendering, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing}, or easily dispatched, as determined by the GM. Typically the creature who caused the troop to lose a segment decides which to remove, or the GM decides when a specific creature wasn't responsible. To restore lost segments and maximum Hit Points, a troop needs to spend downtime to use long-term treatment on casualties or recruit new members to replace the fallen.

Troops are typically immune to non-damaging effects that target a single creature, such as a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.vLA0q0WOK2YPuJs6]{Charm} spell or the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize} action. An ability that can target 5 or more creatures can target an entire segment, increasing to two segments if it can target 10 or more creatures and to the entire troop if it can target 20 or more creatures. An ability that affects all creatures in a certain range affects all segments in range (make any checks or saves separately for each segment). As examples, an 8th rank charm spell (with 10 targets) can affect two segments, and an ability that Demoralizes all creatures within 30 feet of you would affect all segments that are fully within that range. A non-damaging ability that would prevent a segment from acting, cause them to flee, or otherwise make them unable to function as part of the troop for a round or more removes the segment entirely. The troop loses a number of HP required to bring it to the next threshold. If an ability both deals damage and has a non-damaging effect, apply the damage then the rest of the effect.
Glossary.TroopMovement: 每当一支部队移动时，你都会移动其中一个部分，其他部分则跟随其后。移动结束后，你可以根据自己的喜好，将其他部分聚集到与你移动的部分相邻，前提是这些部分的移动距离都不能超过移动的部分。如果你选择不将部队移动任何距离，你可以改为重新调整所有部分的位置，只要其中一个部分保持不动即可。
Glossary.Wavesense: 这种感知允许怪物感受到那些因为在液体中移动而产生的振波。这是一种在（能力所列出的）有限范围内的模糊感官imprecise sense。只有当怪物位于同一液体中、且仅在对象在此液体中移动时，水波感知才会生效。

PF2E.OrphanedSpellsHeader: 提取法术(移动到上方的法术列表)
PF2E.PreciousMaterialAbysiumDescription: 渊铀是一种蓝绿色的金属，发着非常怪异的绿色辉光，而且能够辐射出对生命有害的能量。不慎暴露在这种材料前可能导致免疫系统的长期损伤；因此，渊铀的开采是一项充满危险的工作，矿区内数量巨大的这种金属会令附近的所有生物陷入病痛之中。携带着渊铀物品的生物会陷入恶心——标准品质下的轻负载物品会导致恶心1；品质高于标准，或负载在1及以上的物品会导致恶心2；负载在1及以上的高品质物品会导致恶心3。渊铀导致的这种以及其他所有的恶心效果均为毒素效果。制造者可以使用1单位渊铀块制造最多6剂量的有毒渊铀粉末。不道德的铁匠可能会利用渊铀的毒性制造剧毒武器和致命物质。由渊铀制造的所有物品都会散发出半径10尺的昏暗光照。
PF2E.PreciousMaterialAdamantineDescription: 开采于从天堂堕至地面的岩石中，精金是已知的最硬的金属之一。它有着闪亮的黑色光泽，因其惊人的弹性和保持锋刃锐利度的特性而价格不菲。
PF2E.PreciousMaterialColdIronDescription: 寒铁制的武器对恶魔和精类非常致命。寒铁看上去和普通铁没什么两样，但开采于品质非常高的铁矿且加工过程中只是用极少热量甚至不使用热量。整个过程非常困难，高品质寒铁物品更是如此。
PF2E.PreciousMaterialDawnsilverDescription: 朝银因其轻巧、耐用和对恶魔与兽化人的特效而闻名。它有着和银一样的色泽但更轻。朝银武器和护甲在伤害对银有弱点的生物时可以视为银制。朝银制的金属物品比钢铁制的要轻：物品负载降低1（若正常负载为1，则变为L，对于正常为L的物品来说无效果）。朝银制物品的价格基于物品正常的负载，而非朝银减少过后的负载，不过朝银减少负载的计算，在其它因体型而对物品负载的进行的调整之前。
PF2E.PreciousMaterialDjezetDescription: 这种锈红色金属在室温下是液体，因此即便对于最熟练的冶金学家来说，利用血汞材料来制作也是一件非常有挑战的工作，这在某些地方为其赢得了“快铁”的称号。血汞对魔法的反应也非常剧烈，即使处于固态可操作的合金状态中。它在受到魔法作用时会发光，以血汞合金制成物品也会闪烁着猩红色的条纹，这让某些铁匠给它起了个“虎纹铁”的绰号。当被法术瞄准时，由血汞合金制成的物品会展现出这些发光的红色记号，持续1轮或法术的持续时间中更长的时间。1单位的血汞块内的血汞含量足够提炼出2单位的血汞剂。
PF2E.PreciousMaterialDragonhideDescription: 龙的鳞片和皮革只能用来制作任何本来就用毛皮或皮革制作的物品。龙革种类繁多从蓝色到闪金都有，取决于龙革取自哪里。鉴于龙鳞的韧性，除此之外它还能用来制作金属板甲（比如胸甲、半身甲或全身甲），让这些护甲不使用金属制作。龙革物品免疫一种伤害类型，取决于龙的类型。
PF2E.PreciousMaterialDreamwebDescription: 由织网者本体胸节所吐出的蛛丝所制，梦网赋予若干神秘效果。由梦网制成的布质物品与绳索具有如下属性：硬度 4，生命值每英寸 12，破坏DC16。以梦网制成的轻甲比常规布甲或皮甲更轻：其负载减少1（若原为轻负载则不变，对已为轻负载的物品无影响）。梦网轻甲给予穿戴者毒素抗力，数值等于3加上该护甲的护甲潜能符文数值。
PF2E.PreciousMaterialDuskwoodDescription: 夕木是一种非常轻的木头，发现其原生于阿维斯坦南方中心地带的原始森林中；它如同乌木一般暗色，不同点是会显露出淡紫色来。夕木物品的负载降低1（若正常负载为1，则变为L，对于正常为L的物品来说无效果）。夕木制物品的价格基于物品正常的负载，而非夕木减少过后的负载，不过夕木减少负载的计算，在其它因体型而对物品负载的进行的调整之前。
PF2E.PreciousMaterialGrisantianPeltDescriptio: This supernaturally tough animal skin is gold and shines in sunlight. It can be used to make any item usually made of cloth, leather, or hide. This material is immune to fire, and its Hardness is doubled against piercing or slashing damage. Up to 4 Bulk of grisantian pelt can be harvested from a single creature (this is usually more than enough for 4 suits of standard grade armor or 2 suit of high-grade armor).
PF2E.PreciousMaterialInubrixDescription: 这种苍白，易锻的金属有着不同寻常的分子结构，能在不接触钢铁的情况下部分穿透过去。虽然这种性质在制作可穿透金属护甲的武器时十分有用，但虚铅仅仅比铅要结实那么一点。即使处于合金态中，这种天金也过于脆弱，以至于难以用来制作可靠的盾牌，也不适合用来制作护甲。
PF2E.PreciousMaterialKeepStoneDescription: 高盔堡上千年的冶金发展和工程的最高成就是名为护石的优秀合金。尽管它名为护石，但生产护石并不需要使用任何石材。高盔堡最伟大的工匠们通过一种高度保密的冶金工艺将精金与铅熔炼在一起，开发出了一种外观看起来更像是大理石而非金属的材料。护石的强度仅比精金稍弱一点，但却具有着极佳的抗魔性质。以未经加工的护石为目标的任何法术或魔法效果必须成功通过DC 5的纯骰检定，失败会导致效果失效。
PF2E.PreciousMaterialNoqualDescription: 零晶又轻又强韧，而且也被证实对魔法具有强大的抗力。这种抗力的副作用是在使用零晶制作魔法武器时需要一些复杂而昂贵的炼金对策。科沃斯·库，纽梅利亚的黑君（Kevoth-Kull, the Black Sovereign of Numeria），使用零晶和寒铁开发出了一种被称为霸钢的合金，能够缓和这种性质。这种金属的水晶外观可能会被认为性质脆弱，但这种惨绿色的材料和铁具有类似的性质。使用零晶制成的物品在该物品尝试对抗魔法的豁免检定中具有+4环境加值，该加值也适用于持有者在从魔法中保护物品的这种特定豁免（例如对抗锈蚀爪Rusting Grasp法术）。
PF2E.PreciousMaterialOrichalcumDescription: 作为最稀有和贵重的天金，山铜因其与时间相关的魔法特性而广受垂涎。这种灰暗如铜的金属不比精金结实，但它的弯曲时间特性能保护自身，使得其硬度和ＨＰ更高。若山铜物品受到了伤害但未被摧毁，它将在24小时后完全修复好自身。
PF2E.PreciousMaterialPeachwoodDescription: 桃木武器在阳光直射下会呈现出一种特别的赤褐色。当打击具有和夕木有关的抗力或弱点的不死生物时，桃木将被视为夕木（这能让桃木武器忽视僵尸jiang-shi的抗力）。此外，桃木武器还能忽视一部分任意类型的不死生物的抗力。使用桃木武器打击不死生物时，标准品质忽视不死生物2点抗力，高品质忽视4点抗力。
PF2E.PreciousMaterialSiccatiteDescription: 在原始状态下，这种银质矿石可能极端炎热或异常寒冷。这种矿石究竟是两种相关的物质，还是一种通过某种未知的过程决定其输出温度的物质，冶金学家们有不同的看法。无论何种原因，这种材料极端的温度意味着它必须被慎重处理。热漠石能够轻易点燃纸张和干草这样的可燃物，而寒漠石在放入潮湿区域时会迅速在表面上生成厚厚的冰层。与大量漠石直接接触的生物，在保持接触的每轮都会受到1点能量伤害（热漠石造成火焰伤害，寒漠石造成寒冷伤害）。
PF2E.PreciousMaterialSilverDescription: 银制物品对恶魔到狼人一脉来说非常致命。银制物品不如铁制耐用，低品质银制物品通常只是镀银。
PF2E.PreciousMaterialSisterstoneDescription: 姐妹石是一种术语，用于指代产出于在少女之原的被精魂注入的两种密切相关矿石——黄昏姐妹石和绯红姐妹石。黄昏姐妹石是淡橙色，而猩红色姐妹石是淡红色，除了颜色不同外，它们具有相同的物理特性。当靠近另一种姐妹石制成的物品时，它们都会开始散发出排斥不死生物的精神能量。
PF2E.PreciousMaterialSloughstoneDescription: 用蜕石制造的武器利用了维瑞克斯之骸对自己不情愿转化的憎恨，让其自身的肉体与自身作对。加工蜕石既困难又令人不快，使用这种材料制作物品的DC会增加4。构造物不能使用蜕石建造。
PF2E.PreciousMaterialSovereignSteelDescriptio: 这种由黑君科沃斯-库(Black Sovereign Kevoth-Kul)所创造的寒铁和天金零晶(noqual)的合金，对于魔法攻击有抗性。由于冷锻这两种金属的工法极其复杂精准，想取得霸钢武器或护甲的角色基本上除了前往星坠城以外别无选择。虽然有人提出过用霸钢来造盾牌，但科沃斯-库发飙怒吼了说盾牌没有一点屁用后便下令禁止以霸钢铸盾。直至今日黑君手下的铁匠没有人敢用命来试试这命令是不是个玩笑。所有以霸钢制作的物品(包含下述的霸钢武器与护甲)，在抵抗魔法效果的豁免检定上获得+4环境加值，而持有者在进行专门保护该物品不受法术影响的豁免上(例如锈蚀之触APG)也能获得这个加值。
PF2E.PreciousMaterialWarpglassDescription: 这种奇异的物质由漩涡的原始、混沌本质制成。它可以被制成武器和物品，但太不稳定，无法制成有用的盔甲或盾牌。原始的扭曲玻璃是一种乳白色的玻璃质材料，具有惊人的强度。加工时，它会改变外观——但不改变性质——呈现出其他金属和不同类型石材的随机条纹。

RecallKnowledge.Help: 你可以尝试重复对某一生物的回忆知识检定，这次检定的难度增加规则由下表所示。如果检定失败或针对表中未列出的生物，则无法二次尝试回忆知识。
RecallKnowledge.Label: 回忆知识

Default.Description: 你使用你所持用的一件武器攻击或无武装攻击。选择一个在你触及范围（近战攻击）或在射程内（远程攻击）的生物。为你的这次攻击掷攻击骰并将结果和该生物的AC比较来决定效果。

Melee.Description: 你使用你所持用的近战武器攻击。选择一个在你触及范围的生物，为你的这次攻击掷攻击骰并用结果和该生物的AC比较来决定效果。
Melee.Success: 你造成的伤害依据武器攻击的骰数，并加上全部伤害加值、调整值和减值.

Ranged.Description: 你用你所持的一件武器攻击，选择一个射程内的生物。为你的这次攻击掷攻击骰并用该结果和目标生物的AC比较来决定效果。
